auth.login_intro: Sign in with your school account.

password_reset.title: Reset student password
password_reset.mode_generate_desc: Magister creates a random password and shows it once.
password_reset.mode_manual_desc: Type a password yourself (e.g. when you've already handed one out).
password_reset.force_change_label: Require student to change password on next sign-in
password_reset.success_generate_note: Write it down or hand it over now — it will not be shown again.
password_reset.error_student_disabled: Student is disabled in AD — reset not possible.
password_reset.error_student_not_in_ad: Student not found in AD. Check AD sync.
password_reset.error_not_a_student: This user is not a student.
password_reset.error_password_policy: Password does not meet AD policy.

errors.title: Error
errors.ad_unavailable: Active Directory is unreachable — data may be stale.
errors.user_not_synced: Your account is not yet synced into Magister. Contact IT.
errors.csrf_invalid: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.
